steps.title: Parallel the needed feature
steps.content: The blank describes features required for running on land and is parallel to 'features needed for flying through the air.' The word must mean necessary.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice B, trivial, means unimportant. Choice C, challenging, means difficult. Choice D, approved, means officially accepted. None parallels 'needed' or explains why running features restrict speed. Essential means necessary, so it fits the comparison. The answer is A.
